Action.Dst: ProgramFiles\SAP Front End\SAP Knowledge Warehouse\SAP KW Translator

Action.Src: Option Explicit NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "KW Script: Checking if environment variable IWBPath is already set..." Dim regKey regKey = "HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager\Environment\IWBPath" If NwEngine.Shell.RegValueExist(regKey) Then NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "KW Script: Environment Variable IWBPath is already set, no reboot needed" Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "KW Script: Environment Variable IWBPath is NOT set, it will be added, a reboot is needed!" If NwEngine.Context.Reboot = 0 Then NwEngine.Context.Reboot = 1 Else NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "KW Script: Reboot is already set to " & NwEngine.Context.Reboot & ", no change needed, Wksta needs to be rebootet" End If End If
